title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; identical API surface to the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter that plugs any Ollama model into chains, agents, retrieval, and tool-calling pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat web UI (formerly Ollama-WebUI) with multi-user support, model management, and RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; offers synchronous, asynchronous, and reactive APIs.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation template using Ollama, LangChain, and Chroma.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI wrapper with chat history, markdown rendering, and keybindings.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing Ollama generators and embedders for production-grade pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, embeddings, and tool-call deserialization.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Native n8n node that integrates Ollama models into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI/CD pipelines that need to spin up Ollama containers and run model tasks.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama; mirrors the Python/JS SDK feature set.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels via mentions or slash commands.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama’s REST API with GenServer-based process management.
